name: com.laureth.painter-suite
description: Visual Collider Painter + Iso/2D Parallax Layer Painter for Unity 2D pipelines. Drag-to-create colliders in SceneView, Photoshop-style layer composition, sort-axis aware iso support, template/copy-paste workflow. Designed for top-down/iso/2.5D indie games.

samples.description: 5 demo prop sprites + 7 collider templates + sample scene with parallax layers
